content.cn_text: 下午好，欢迎来到斯坦顿大学。
content.en_text: Good afternoon and welcome to Stanton University.

content.cn_text: 我在这里告诉你，如果你选择来这里，我们有各种各样的宿舍。
content.en_text: I'm here to tell you about the various halls of residence we have available should you choose to come here.

content.cn_text: 我们的目标是为所有一年级学生提供宿舍，你会发现有很多选择。
content.en_text: We aim to offer accommodation in Halls to all first-year students and you'll find there's a good variety to choose from.

content.cn_text: 首先，有布朗厅，你会看到，它不是最现代化的建筑，但它很受一些学生的欢迎。
content.en_text: First of all, there's Brown Hall, which, as you'll see, is not the most modern of buildings but it is very popular with some students.

content.cn_text: 它有很好的社区意识，一些翻新得很好的厨房，与其他宿舍不同的是，它最近在地下室建了一个健身房。
content.en_text: It's got a good sense of community, some nice refurbished kitchens and, unlike the other halls, it has recently had a gym built in its basement.

content.cn_text: 另一个选择是布莱克住宅，它像一个大房子一样，所以每个人都在一起做饭和吃饭。
content.en_text: Another option is Blake Residence, which is built like a large house and so everybody cooks and eats together.

content.cn_text: 它有自己的私人花园，更安静的是，因为这是一个所有女孩的住所，当然，男孩是允许参观大厅，我知道，经常参加烹饪晚餐!
content.en_text: It has its own sectioned-off bit of private garden and is even more peaceful because this is an all-girls residence, although of course boys are allowed to visit the Hall and, I understand, frequently take part in cooking dinner!

content.cn_text: 我们最大的大厅是皇后大楼，最近刚刚升级。
content.en_text: The largest hall we have is Queens Building and this has been upgraded recently.

content.cn_text: 原来的停车场被扩建了，因此大厅现在有了一个大的公共休息室，每个卧室现在都有自己的淋浴间，许多学生认为这是一个真正的奖励。
content.en_text: The original parking area has been built on so that the hall now has a large common room and each bedroom now has its own shower room, which many students regard as a real bonus.

content.cn_text: 另一个选择是Parkway Flats，它在当时获得了设计奖，现在这座建筑已经被保护了。
content.en_text: A further option is the Parkway Flats, which won an award for design in its day and this building now has a preservation order on it.

content.cn_text: 这意味着只有有限的数量可以做升级，周围地区很重要，所以公寓周围不允许停车。
content.en_text: This has meant that only a limited amount could be done to upgrade it and the surrounding area is important so parking is not permitted around the Flats.

content.cn_text: 然而，公寓确实有许多额外的设施，如一个特别的电脑室，一个小图书馆和一个自助餐厅。
content.en_text: However, the Flats do have many extra facilities such as a special computer room, a small library and a self-service restaurant.

content.cn_text: 早餐，午餐和晚餐的费用都包含在这个大厅的费用中，所以它看起来有点多
content.en_text: The cost of breakfast, lunch and dinner is covered in the fees for this hall so it does look a bit more

content.cn_text: 贵了。
content.en_text: expensive.

content.cn_text: 我们可以提供给您的最后一个房间是Temple Rise，因为房间更大，所以也比其他大厅稍微贵一些。
content.en_text: The last residence we can offer you is Temple Rise, which again is slightly more expensive than other halls as the rooms are larger.

content.cn_text: 从这里可以看到美丽的海岸景色，这足以弥补这里的浴室是六名学生共用的这一事实。
content.en_text: This has got very lovely views across to the coast and this more than compensates for the fact that bathrooms here are shared between six students.

content.cn_text: 然而，大厅有家政人员每周打扫一次房间，所以这可能是一个有吸引力的选择。
content.en_text: However, the hall has domestic staff who clean the rooms once a week so this is perhaps an attractive option for the messier amongst you.

content.cn_text: 如果我能在墙上的地图上标出它们的位置，你们可能会想去看看。
content.en_text: Now if I can just show on this wall map here where they all are, you might like to go and have a look round.

content.cn_text: 如果你进入大学的正门，在第一个路口你会发现布朗厅就在剧院对面的拐角处。
content.en_text: If you come into the main university entrance, at the first junction you'll find that Brown Hall is on the corner opposite the theatre.

content.cn_text: 所以你住得很好，而且离车站很近——不过我觉得交通堵塞会有点吵。
content.en_text: So you're nice and near the station here – though I think it can get a bit noisy with traffic.

content.cn_text: 这同样适用于Blake Residence，它正对着大学入口。这些大厅经常被医学院学生等人使用，因为他们整天都在外面，所以不会注意到噪音。
content.en_text: The same applies to Blake Residence, which is directly facing the junction to the university entrance.These Halls are often used by medical students and such like as they're out all day so don't notice the noise.

content.cn_text: 无论如何，如果你沿着校园路向主圆环走，你会看到图书馆在拐角处，皇后大厦就在你向北走的时候。
content.en_text: Anyway, if you then walk along Campus Road towards the main Circle, you'll see the library on the corner and Queens Building is just past that as you head north.

content.cn_text: 你会发现这里更安静，游客也更少!
content.en_text: You will find that it is quieter here and you may get fewer visitors!

content.cn_text: 顺便说一下，圆圈是校园的一大特色，因为它坐落在山上，中间有一个全新的体育中心，值得一看。
content.en_text: By the way the Circle is quite a feature of the campus as it's set into the hills and has a brand new sports centre in the middle – it's worth going to look around it.

content.cn_text: 现在，Parkway公寓在图书馆对面的角落，面对着圆环，就在你走向主楼的方向上。
content.en_text: Now, the Parkway Flats are on the opposite corner to the library, facing the Circle,as you head towards the main buildings.

content.cn_text: 主楼离这里只有五分钟的步行路程，这些大厅的座位很快就会被占用，所以我的建议是尽快预订座位。
content.en_text: The main buildings are only about a five-minute walk from here and places in these halls go quickly so my advice is to reserve your place as soon as possible.

content.cn_text: 然后，Temple Rise就在圆圈内，在体育中心旁边，但离大学的主要建筑更远。
content.en_text: Then Temple Rise is inside the Circle, next to the sports centre,but further from the main university buildings.

content.cn_text: 现在，如果你想离开…
content.en_text: Now, if you'd like to go off and …

groups.desc:
Questions 11-15
Which features are available at the following halls of residence?
Choose FIVE answers below and write the correct letter A-G next to Questions 11-15.
groups.title: List of Features

items.title: Brown Hall
items.analysis: Brown Hall的正确答案是G（sports facilities），因为原文明确提到"it has recently had a gym built in its basement"。健身房（gym）是一种体育设施，与选项G完全吻合。这个信息是在描述Brown Hall的特点时直接给出的，因此可以确定这是该宿舍楼的一个独特特征。

items.title: Blake Residence
items.analysis: Blake Residence被描述为"an all-girls residence"（全女生宿舍），这明确表明它是一个单一性别的宿舍。尽管男生可以访问和参与活动，但居住者仅限女生。因此，选项F "single sex"（单一性别）是最符合这一描述的答案。

items.title: Queens Building
items.analysis: Queens Building拥有私人淋浴间是正确答案，因为原文明确指出"each bedroom now has its own shower room"（每个卧室现在都有自己的淋浴间）。这直接对应了选项C "private showers"（私人淋浴）。文中还强调这被学生视为"a real bonus"（真正的福利），进一步突出了这一特征的重要性。

items.title: Parkway Flats
items.analysis: 文中明确指出Parkway Flats的费用包含了早餐、午餐和晚餐的成本。这直接对应了选项B "all meals included"（包含所有餐食）。虽然这使得Parkway Flats的费用看起来比其他宿舍高，但它确实提供了全包式的餐食服务。因此，B选项是最符合原文描述的正确答案。

items.title: Temple Rise
items.analysis: 文中明确提到Temple Rise有家政人员每周清洁房间一次，这直接对应了选项A "cleaning Included"（包含清洁服务）。这是唯一明确提到的与给出选项相符的特征，因此A是正确答案。其他特征如海景和共用浴室虽然被提到，但不在选项列表中。

groups.desc:
Questions 16-20
Label the map below.
Write the correct letter A-G next to Questions 16-20.

items.title: Brown Hall
items.analysis: 根据听力内容，Brown Hall位于主入口的第一个交叉口的角落，正对着剧院的位置。根据地图，剧院的位置对应B，因此Brown Hall在B的位置。

items.title: Blake Residence
items.analysis: Blake Residence在录音中被描述为“directly facing the junction to the university entrance”（直接面对大学入口的交叉路口）。从地图上看，唯一符合此描述的位置是A。因此，答案是A。

items.title: Queens Building
items.analysis: Parkway Flats的位置在原文中提到是在图书馆的对面角落，面向Circle。这明确指出了C的位置，因为在地图上，C正好位于图书馆对面的角落并且面向Circle。

items.title: Parkway Flats
items.analysis: 因为听力材料明确指出Temple Rise在Circle内，紧邻sports centre，而地图上唯一符合这一描述的位置就是E。

items.title: Temple Rise
items.analysis: 听力原文清楚地描述了 Temple Rise 的位置，即“inside the Circle” 和 “next to the sports centre”。在地图上，Circle 是一个圆形区域，体育中心（sports centre）的标记为 D，而 Temple Rise 应在 Circle 里并靠近体育中心，因此答案是 D。
